economic_notes: Nation has six business enterprises accounted for by modified equity method: Coast Salish Development Corporation, Thuy'she'num Property Management LP, Deer Point Developments LP, Ivy Green Petroleum LP, Thuthiqut Resources LP, Thuy'she'num Investments LP. Consolidated subsidiaries include CMHC Social Housing Program, 1089106 B.C. Ltd., and Stz'uminus Education Society.
notes: Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 on a prospective basis - no prior period restatement. Six GBEs accounted for by modified equity method with December 31 year-ends. Large ISC deferred revenue balance of $14,490,083 for IR#13 Water Project Funding received in year. Accumulated surplus per statement is $96,015,321 but includes distribution to members of $681,198 deducted after annual surplus before other items. Long-term debt total calculated from partial note disclosure - note appears truncated. Total government transfers calculated as ISC $14,584,342 + Province of BC $3,539,637 + FNHA $2,541,973 + FNESC $2,045,387 + CSEAT $420,813 + CMHC $164,253 + ISC trust fund interest $7,628 = $23,304,033 (approximation as note was truncated). expenses_education includes both Education schedule ($457,319) and Stz'uminus Education Society ($11,292,715).
